claimText: BrahMos is a two-stage supersonic cruise missile jointly developed by India and Russia, utilizing a solid booster and a liquid ramjet.
evidenceExcerpt: BrahMos is a 2-stage supersonic cruise missile (solid booster, liquid ramjet) jointly developed by India and Russia with a range up to 290 km.
examUse: Statement-based question on missile stages, propulsion types, and joint ventures.

claimText: Astra is an indigenously developed Beyond Visual Range Air-to-Air missile (BVRAAM) by DRDO.
evidenceExcerpt: Astra is an indigenous Beyond Visual Range Air-to-Air missile (BVRAAM) developed by DRDO with a range exceeding 100 km.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching missiles to their operational type (e.g., Air-to-Air).

claimText: Pralay is a surface-to-surface short-range quasi-ballistic missile capable of hypersonic speeds.
evidenceExcerpt: Pralay is a surface-to-surface short-range quasi-ballistic missile (150-500 km) capable of hypersonic speeds.
examUse: Statement-based question on missile trajectory, launch platform, and speed capabilities.

claimText: Akash Prime is a Surface-to-Air Missile (SAM) system specifically designed for extreme cold and high altitudes above 4500 meters.
evidenceExcerpt: Akash Prime is a rugged SAM system designed for extreme cold and high altitudes above 4500 meters.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific operational environments and capabilities of indigenous SAM systems.

claimText: Rampage is a long-range, air-to-ground supersonic precise attack missile developed by Israel Aerospace Industries.
evidenceExcerpt: Rampage is an Israeli-developed long-range, air-to-ground supersonic precise attack missile.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching imported missiles to their country of origin.
